maps.name: 新艾利都
maps.description: 异常控制局总部所在地，也是异能者活动的核心区域。
maps.descriptionEn: Headquarters of the Anomaly Control Bureau and the main activity area for Espers.

markers.description: 新艾利都南部区域传送点
markers.descriptionEn: South area waypoint of New Elydon

markers.name: 普通宝箱·中央广场
markers.description: 中央广场角落的普通宝箱
markers.descriptionEn: Common chest in the corner of Central Square

markers.name: 精致宝箱·东区巷道
markers.description: 东区巷道尽头隐藏的精致宝箱
markers.descriptionEn: Exquisite chest hidden at the end of East Alley

markers.name: 珍贵宝箱·屋顶平台
markers.description: 需要攀爬到屋顶平台获取的珍贵宝箱
markers.descriptionEn: Precious chest on a rooftop platform, requires climbing

markers.name: 华丽宝箱·地下通道
markers.description: 地下通道深处的华丽宝箱，需解谜开启
markers.descriptionEn: Luxurious chest deep in underground passage, requires puzzle

markers.name: 异象碎片解谜·西区
markers.description: 收集3个异象碎片解锁的解谜挑战
markers.descriptionEn: Puzzle challenge unlocked by collecting 3 anomaly shards

markers.name: 符文连线解谜·北区
markers.description: 按正确顺序连接符文的解谜
markers.descriptionEn: Puzzle requiring correct rune link sequence

markers.name: 能量管道解谜·南区
markers.description: 重新排列能量管道方向的解谜
markers.descriptionEn: Puzzle requiring rearrangement of energy pipe directions

markers.name: 伊本古董店
markers.description: 主角所属的古董店，可接取主线任务
markers.descriptionEn: The antique shop where the protagonist works, main quest hub

markers.name: 异常控制局
markers.description: 异常控制局总部，可接取收容任务
markers.descriptionEn: Anomaly Control Bureau HQ, containment mission hub

markers.name: 斯特里快递站
markers.description: 快递站NPC，可接取支线任务
markers.descriptionEn: Delivery station NPC, side quest hub

markers.name: 城市天际线观景点
markers.description: 新艾利都最高点，可俯瞰全城天际线
markers.descriptionEn: Highest point in New Elydon, overlooks the entire city skyline

markers.name: 河畔夜景观景点
markers.description: 河畔最佳夜景拍摄点
markers.descriptionEn: Best riverside spot for night photography

markers.name: 异象裂缝观景点
markers.description: 可近距离观察异象裂缝的观景点
markers.descriptionEn: Viewpoint to observe anomaly rifts up close

maps.name: 海瑟劳·商业区
maps.description: 海瑟劳繁华的商业区，商店、餐厅和娱乐场所林立。
maps.descriptionEn: The bustling commercial district of Hethereau, lined with shops, restaurants, and entertainment.

markers.name: 武器改装店
markers.description: 武器强化和改装商店
markers.descriptionEn: Weapon enhancement and modification shop

markers.name: 杂货店
markers.description: 出售各类基础材料
markers.descriptionEn: Sells various basic materials

markers.name: 普通宝箱·商场后巷
markers.description: 商场后方小巷中的宝箱
markers.descriptionEn: Chest in the back alley behind the mall

markers.name: 商业区传送点
markers.description: 海瑟劳商业区中心传送点
markers.descriptionEn: Central waypoint of Hethereau Commercial District

markers.name: 商业街夜景
markers.description: 霓虹灯闪烁的商业街最佳拍摄点
markers.descriptionEn: Best photo spot for neon-lit commercial street
